cot_prefix: Okay, I need to figure out the time in France when it's 2 pm in China. Let me try to remember the time difference between China and France. China is in the China Standard Time zone (CST), which is UTC+8. France, being in Western Europe, is in the Central European Time zone (CET), which is UTC+1 during standard time and UTC+2 during daylight saving time. But the question doesn't mention daylight saving time, so I should assume standard time unless told otherwise. So, China is UTC+8 and France is UTC+1. The time difference between them would be 8 - 1 = 7 hours. So when it's 2 pm in China (UTC+8), it would
